name: LoanManager

methods.name: create
methods.desc: Initialize the LoanManager. Called once at deployment.

methods.name: set_escrow
methods.desc: Set the RepaymentEscrow app ID. Admin-only.

methods.name: create_loan
methods.desc:
Create a new loan request. Caller must be KYC-verified.
Returns the loan_id.
Caller must include a payment transaction covering box MBR for the new loan record box.
Enforces:     - Borrower must be KYC verified (via KYCRegistry foreign read)     - Borrower must not have another active loan     - Amount must be within the score-based cap

methods.name: approve_and_disburse
methods.desc:
Approve a pending loan and disburse funds. Oracle-only.
Atomically:     1. Set loan state to ACTIVE     2. Call LendingPool.disburse() to send ALGO to borrower     3. Record the active loan for the borrower

methods.name: repay
methods.desc:
Repay a loan. Called by the borrower.
The borrower must include a PaymentTransaction to this app address as a preceding transaction in the group.

methods.name: mark_default
methods.desc: Mark a loan as defaulted. Oracle-only.

methods.name: get_loan
methods.desc: Get a loan record by ID. Reverts if not found.

methods.name: get_active_loan_id
methods.desc: Get the active loan ID for a borrower. Returns max uint64 if none.

methods.name: get_loan_count
methods.desc: Total number of loans ever created.

desc:
Central loan management contract.

    Access control:
        - create_loan: any KYC-verified borrower
        - approve_loan / mark_default: oracle only
        - repay: borrower of that specific loan
        - admin methods: admin only

sourceInfo.errorMessage: invalid number of bytes for arc4.bool
invalid number of bytes for arc4.static_array<arc4.uint8, 32>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.uint64
